name: solon-mcp
description: Enforce your team's coding standards directly from Claude Code or Cursor. Check code against playbook rules, get enabled rules for a repo, and log reviews to your Solon AI dashboard.

tools.name: solon_check_standards
tools.description: Check code against your team's playbook rules configured in Solon AI

tools.name: solon_get_playbook
tools.description: Get the enabled playbook rules for a connected repo in Solon AI

tools.name: solon_record_review
tools.description: Record a completed code review to the Solon AI dashboard
